The '''A-24 ''Sleuth''-class scout ship''', often called simply the '''A-24 Sleuth''', was a model of high-performance [[Scout ship/Legends|scout vessel]] built by the venerable [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]].

==Characteristics==
Designed by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] at its peak<ref name="WBC" /> for stealth and speed, the A-24 was a long and narrow craft, with a distinctive flat and triangular aft that housed the ship's engines, weapons, and distinctive stabilizers.<ref name="UNKNOWN" /> Amidships, the A-24 sported a pair of canards that supported the ship's powerful sensor and communications arrays, while the forward command deck, while cramped, sported a cockpit that was offset by panoramic sheets of thick photosensitive [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]].<ref name="UNKNOWN" />

True to its role as a scout ship, the panoramic cockpit gave the pilot a nearly unobstructed view of the ship's surroundings, while the A-24's powerful [[Fabritech/Legends|Fabritech]] multi-role sensor suite combined active and passive sensors, optical and electronic enhancers, and a full suite of [[Dedicated energy receptor/Legends|dedicated energy receptors]], [[Full-spectrum transceiver/Legends|full-spectrum transceivers]], and [[Life-form scanner/Legends|lifeform scanners]] to give the pilot a comprehensive readout and analysis of their surroundings.<ref name="UNKNOWN" />

Ultimately, the A-24 was renowned for being small, fast, and hard to detect - qualities that made it highly regarded as a blockade runner and getaway ship.<ref name="EDGE" /><ref name="GALAXY" /> Possessing superb speed and being highly maneuverable and agile, the A-24 was considered one of the best-in-class for a ship under twenty meters.<ref name="COMPLETE" /><ref name="GALAXY" />

Routinely, the A-24 was used for scouting, spying, smuggling, and any other activity in which a small and incredibly fast ship was needed.<ref name="GALAXY" /> While the A-24 came modifiable, and there was some variance in tonnage, passengers, and length, these changes were nearly always modest in nature.<ref name="DATABASE" /><ref name="WBC" /><ref name="UNKNOWN" />

==History==
[[File:IncomA24Sleuth-GG10p111-WBCp81.png|thumb|right|200px|An A-24 Sleuth Scout]]
One of the few ships that could slip past a blockade without being noticed, the A-24 was sometimes used to get important people off blockaded [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and through [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial patrols]]. One A-24 was the ''[[Red Fang]]'' owned by [[Mol Hedron]]; Mol used the modified ''Red Fang'' for spying on [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] activities, and installed a high-powered tight-beam transmitter to send nearly undetectable messages to facilitate this.<ref name="WBC" />
